programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Four members of the Artemis II crew embark on a perilous 10-day journey to orbit the moon.

programme.title: Frontline
programme.desc: Examining the tactics, legal cases and impact of the violence, protests and arrests stemming from the federal immigration sweeps across the country, from Los Angeles to Chicago to Minneapolis.

programme.title: Independent Lens
programme.sub-title: Backside: The Unseen Hands of Horse Racing
programme.desc: A glimpse into the lives of the immigrant grooms who care for Kentucky Derby racehorses year-round at Churchill Downs.

programme.title: The Creation Rose
programme.desc: The design, construction and cultural impact of the Washington National Cathedral's "third great eye" -- the nearly 30 foot diameter stained-glass West Rose window.

programme.desc: Old port town of Nafplio; the ruins of Olympia; preserved theater at Epidauros; ancient capital of Mycenae; Mani Peninsula.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters investigate a weather mystery surrounding massive rocks that move on their own in the desert.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Luke plays doctor with Stu as a nurse and Lyla pretends to be different patients; Lyla, Everett, Luke and Stu build an elaborate track to get a tennis ball down to the lobby.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Autograph Collection; the Rope Collection
programme.desc: When Nico teases Carl about bikes being for babies, he sets out to prove Nico wrong; Carl and his Fuzzytown friends can't wait to build a tree fort, but Carl has a hard time working as a team.
